title: AI Content Creation Systems
subtitle: Build a repeatable AI-powered content engine that produces quality content at scale

modules.title: Content Strategy with AI
lessons: What a content system is and why it beats one-off posts
Using AI to research your audience and find content gaps
Building a content calendar with AI assistance
Defining your brand voice and feeding it to AI
Choosing the right content formats for your goals
modules.mini_task: Use AI to generate a 30-day content calendar for a chosen niche

modules.title: The AI Writing Pipeline
lessons: Writing high-quality blog posts with AI in 20 minutes
Creating LinkedIn and social media posts from long-form content
Email newsletter generation from a topic brief
Repurposing one piece into five formats automatically
Using AI to write content that sounds human
modules.mini_task: Take one blog post idea and generate 5 different content formats using AI

modules.title: Visual Content with AI
lessons: Generating on-brand images with Midjourney or DALL-E
AI-powered Canva templates for social media
Creating short video scripts with AI
Turning blog posts into carousel posts with AI
Stock photos vs. AI images: when to use each
modules.mini_task: Create 3 on-brand social media graphics using an AI image tool

modules.title: Automating Content Distribution
lessons: Connecting your content workflow with Buffer, Hootsuite, or Zapier
Auto-posting approved content to multiple platforms
Scheduling content batches a week in advance
AI-powered hashtag and SEO optimisation
Tracking content performance automatically
modules.mini_task: Connect an AI content pipeline to auto-schedule 5 posts using Zapier or Buffer

modules.title: Scaling and Refining Your System
lessons: Reviewing content performance and feeding insights back to AI
A/B testing AI-generated headlines
Building a content template library
Delegating content tasks to AI assistants
Scaling from 1 brand to multiple clients or channels
modules.mini_task: Review last week's content performance and refine your AI prompts based on results

final_project: Build and document a complete AI content system: from strategy and writing to visuals and automated distribution — producing at least 10 pieces of content ready to publish.
